title: Amtech L0530 6pc Precision Torx Screwdriver Set, T5, T6, T7, T8, T9 & T10 Plastic Handles Screwdrivers with Plastic Storage Case
features: DURABLE: These precision Torx screwdrivers have hardened steel blades with strong plastic handles
VERSATILE: The set includes sizes T5, T6, T7, T8, T9 and T10 and is supplied in handy plastic storage case
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Amtech L0530 6 Piece Precision Torx Screwdriver Set This 6 Piece Precision Torx Screwdriver Set is the ideal kit for precise or delicate work. It is manufactured with hardened steel blades and durable, soft-plastic handles. You can use these screwdrivers for wider applications including vehicles, motorbikes, bicycles, gadgets, computers, and more. This 6-piece screwdriver set contains six different screwdrivers including T5, T6, T7, T8, T9, T10, and a storage case to keep them all in. Includes: 1 T5 Torx Screwdriver 1 T6 Torx Screwdriver 1 T7 Torx Screwdriver 1 T8 Torx Screwdriver 1 T9 Torx Screwdriver 1 T10 Torx Screwdriver 1 Storage Case
